content.body:
Ships Go AST support via github.com/smacker/go-tree-sitter. Extracts
exported type declarations, exported functions, and exported methods.
Each produces an EXTRACTED fact draft with doc-comment and source line
provenance. Python/TS/Rust/Java/C/C++/C#/Ruby/Java deferred to follow-up
issues due to CGo grammar bundling complexity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add TreeSitterASTExtractor for Go with tests
